title: Data We Collect
body: We collect your email address, display name, and activity data (posts, wiki edits, forum activity, gamification progress). If you connect a third-party login we receive only the profile info you authorise.

title: How We Use Your Data
body: Your data is used solely to operate the service: authenticate you, save your progress, display your profile, and power community features. We do not sell, rent, or share personal data with third parties for marketing.

title: AI Data Handling
body: API keys you provide for AI chat are stored AES-256 encrypted at rest and are never logged in plaintext. Your API keys and conversation content are never used to train any AI model.

title: Your GDPR Rights
body: If you are in the EEA or UK you have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights email privacy@nextra.app. You may request full deletion which completes within 30 days.

title: Cookie Policy
body: We use only essential cookies required to operate the service (session authentication). We do not use tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies.

title: Retention Period
body: Personal data is retained for up to 2 years of account inactivity, after which it is automatically deleted. You may request deletion at any time via Settings or by contacting us.
